title: The Reason for Muhammad b. al-Ba'ith 's Escape and the Consequences of His Affair
description: The Reason for Muhammad b. al-Ba'ith 's Escape and the Consequences of His Affair. Recorded under the year 233 AH (848–849 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 34.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
